name: No-Bake Chocolate Butterfluff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter thoroughly until smooth and creamy.
2. Gradually add the sugar, beating continuously until light and fluffy.
3. Incorporate the melted chocolate, vanilla extract, and egg substitute into the mixture.
4. Beat for an additional 3 minutes until the mixture is smooth and thick enough to spread easily (ensure there are no granules of sugar remaining by rubbing a small amount between your fingers).
5. Chill or freeze the mixture until it has thickened sufficiently. It will become firmer as it cools.
6. Once thickened, use it to frost cakes or desserts.
